title: rubus scaber var. lejolisii
intro: Rubus scaber var. lejolisii, also known as the thimbleberry or mountain thimbleberry, is a type of deciduous shrub belonging to the rose family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its high content of anthocyanins, which have been found to possess medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus scaber var. lejolisii include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the prevention of certain diseases. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations are also used in the form of jams, jellies, and other edible products.
